## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential GrowthX.ai engagement for Seema Kumar's clients Panther and Turnstile, focusing on content marketing strategy and execution.](https://fathom.video/share/LE4GkexRiFUJea3-Ty6pn3wHX6mt9E3g?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Panther (security company, $15-20M ARR) is the primary focus for potential GrowthX engagement](https://fathom.video/share/LE4GkexRiFUJea3-Ty6pn3wHX6mt9E3g?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
  - [GrowthX's process: 8-week strategy sprint ($30K) + 12-month growth execution ($15K/mo)](https://fathom.video/share/LE4GkexRiFUJea3-Ty6pn3wHX6mt9E3g?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [GrowthX differentiators: deep AI-driven workflows, expert-in-loop approach, transparency](https://fathom.video/share/LE4GkexRiFUJea3-Ty6pn3wHX6mt9E3g?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Next steps: Tyler to analyze Panther's content landscape; follow-up meeting scheduled for Friday](https://fathom.video/share/LE4GkexRiFUJea3-Ty6pn3wHX6mt9E3g?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX.ai Service Overview

  - [Two-phase approach: 8-week strategy sprint, then 12-month growth execution](https://fathom.video/share/LE4GkexRiFUJea3-Ty6pn3wHX6mt9E3g?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Strategy sprint ($30K) develops company context, audience personas, brand voice](https://fathom.video/share/LE4GkexRiFUJea3-Ty6pn3wHX6mt9E3g?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Execution phase ($15K/mo) focuses on content creation and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/LE4GkexRiFUJea3-Ty6pn3wHX6mt9E3g?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Can start publishing content by week 5-6 of strategy sprint (\~10 articles by end of phase one)](https://fathom.video/share/LE4GkexRiFUJea3-Ty6pn3wHX6mt9E3g?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [Editorial focus first, potential for programmatic content later](https://fathom.video/share/LE4GkexRiFUJea3-Ty6pn3wHX6mt9E3g?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)

### Panther vs. Turnstile as Potential Clients

  - [Panther: More established ($15-20M ARR), better fit for GrowthX's pricing](https://fathom.video/share/LE4GkexRiFUJea3-Ty6pn3wHX6mt9E3g?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [Turnstile: Earlier stage, may struggle with GrowthX's current pricing](https://fathom.video/share/LE4GkexRiFUJea3-Ty6pn3wHX6mt9E3g?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [Focus shifted to Panther due to better alignment with GrowthX's offerings](https://fathom.video/share/LE4GkexRiFUJea3-Ty6pn3wHX6mt9E3g?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)

### Panther's Current Content Situation

  - [39 domain authority score, 13,000 organic traffic/month, 367 pages](https://fathom.video/share/LE4GkexRiFUJea3-Ty6pn3wHX6mt9E3g?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)
  - [No dedicated content leader; product marketer writes blogs "in spare time"](https://fathom.video/share/LE4GkexRiFUJea3-Ty6pn3wHX6mt9E3g?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [Previous freelance attempts unsuccessful; belief that insider knowledge is crucial](https://fathom.video/share/LE4GkexRiFUJea3-Ty6pn3wHX6mt9E3g?tab=summary&timestamp=1198.0)
  - [Key stakeholders: New CPO, CTO (founder), threat researcher, product marketer](https://fathom.video/share/LE4GkexRiFUJea3-Ty6pn3wHX6mt9E3g?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)

### GrowthX.ai Differentiators

  - [AI-driven workflows with expert oversight for deep, quality content](https://fathom.video/share/LE4GkexRiFUJea3-Ty6pn3wHX6mt9E3g?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Transparent process visible to clients through custom platform](https://fathom.video/share/LE4GkexRiFUJea3-Ty6pn3wHX6mt9E3g?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
  - [Intentional client selection for proven results](https://fathom.video/share/LE4GkexRiFUJea3-Ty6pn3wHX6mt9E3g?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [Experience with technical clients (Sentinel One, Abnormal Security, Off Zero)](https://fathom.video/share/LE4GkexRiFUJea3-Ty6pn3wHX6mt9E3g?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)

### ROI Expectations

  - [Primary: Organic traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/LE4GkexRiFUJea3-Ty6pn3wHX6mt9E3g?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [Secondary: Increase in inbound demo requests (commercial deals)](https://fathom.video/share/LE4GkexRiFUJea3-Ty6pn3wHX6mt9E3g?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [Tertiary: Increase in enterprise opportunities (various channels)](https://fathom.video/share/LE4GkexRiFUJea3-Ty6pn3wHX6mt9E3g?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to conduct in-depth analysis of Panther's content landscape](https://fathom.video/share/LE4GkexRiFUJea3-Ty6pn3wHX6mt9E3g?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for Friday, 10:00-10:45 AM Pacific](https://fathom.video/share/LE4GkexRiFUJea3-Ty6pn3wHX6mt9E3g?tab=summary&timestamp=1437.0)
  - [Seema to invite Panther's product marketer and demand gen marketer to next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/LE4GkexRiFUJea3-Ty6pn3wHX6mt9E3g?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
  - [Tyler to send meeting invite and include case studies (Town, Tiro) in follow-up email](https://fathom.video/share/LE4GkexRiFUJea3-Ty6pn3wHX6mt9E3g?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
